# Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy - Compare Costs, Credit Impact [2026]
> Debt consolidation vs bankruptcy: compare costs, credit impact, and outcomes. Which is right for you? Data-driven 2026 comparison guide.

## About
debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy Calculator - Compare Total Costs: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/calculator.html
- Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy: Head-to-Head Comparison (2026): https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/comparison.html
- Cost Comparison: Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy - Total Cost Analysis: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/cost-comparison.html
- Credit Score Impact: Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy Over Time: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/credit-impact.html
- FAQ - Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/faq.html
- How Bankruptcy Works as a Debt Solution - Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 - Debt Consolidation: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/how-bankruptcy-works.html
- How Debt Consolidation Works - Loans, Balance Transfers, and DMPs: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/how-consolidation-works.html
- Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy - Compare Costs, Credit Impact: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/
- Success Rates: Debt Consolidation vs Bankruptcy Discharge Rates: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/success-rates.html
- When Debt Consolidation Fails - Warning Signs and Debt Traps: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/when-consolidation-fails.html
- Who Profits from Debt Consolidation? Follow the Money: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/who-profits.html
- Privacy Policy: https://debtconsolidationvsbankruptcy.com/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
